name: Selection of Fresh Cucumbers
recipeIngredient: 14 pounds for a canner load of 7 quarts
9 pounds for a canner load of 9 pints
1 bushel (48 pounds) yields 16 to 24 quarts, averaging 2 pounds per quart
recipeInstructions: Select firm cucumbers of the appropriate size: about 1-1/2 inches for gherkins and 4 inches for dills. Use odd-shaped and more mature cucumbers for relishes and bread-and-butter style pickles.
